creator: avos@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 150613
Remove (linux-)opera-devel and bump PORTREVISION

- Remove linux-opera-devel from _WEBPLUGIN_APPS_ALL_LINUX.
- Remove opera-devel from _WEBPLUGIN_APPS_ALL_NATIVE.
- Bump PORTREVISION for ports that have 'webplugin:native' or 'webplugin:linux' in USES.
